summary: Test suite thoroughly covers all core retention policies (age, size, keep-latest-N) and their combinations, with good fixture design using make_artifact() and fixed NOW reference for determinism. Well-organized by feature with clear class names and appropriate use of setup_method(). Significant gaps: no error handling tests (invalid inputs, missing files, JSON parse failures), no CLI/load_fixture tests, no print_plan tests. Missing boundary conditions (0 values, negative sizes). Assertions sometimes lack specificity. Core logic would catch regressions well; error paths and integration points rely entirely on act fixture tests.
